title: Token Acquisition Configuration
description: Configures automatic token acquisition for APIs requiring SAML/SSO or similar auth flows.

ttlSeconds.description: Token lifetime in seconds. Use a value slightly less than actual expiry.

url.description: URL to GET for seed HTML page

regex.description: Regex with capture group(1) to extract value from HTML

url.description: Full URL to POST for initial login

body.description: POST body template. {seedValue} is replaced at runtime.

contentType.description: Content-Type for the login POST. Use 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' for form-encoded SAML flows.

base64EncodeSeed.description: When true, Base64-encode the seed value before template substitution (needed for SAML XML).

jwtPath.description: JSON dot-path to JWT in response

sessionPath.description: JSON dot-path to session ID (optional, needed for refresh)

url.description: URL to POST for token refresh

sidHeader.description: Header name for session ID in refresh request
